description: Design UI — Triage flow: Interactive triage mode in the web UI. Presents untriaged ideas one-at-a-time (or in batches). For each: full idea card + related context + LLM-detected duplicates ("similar to IDEA-12, IDEA-45"). Actions: assign priority, promote, kill, skip, discuss, merge (mark as duplicate of another idea). Progress indicator (N/total). Triage summary on completion. Priority lens selector to filter triage by persona.
